---
title: 'Frontline data science: Lessons learned from a pandemic'
date: '2023-01-01'
author: [Emily A Beck, Hannah Tavalire, Jake Searcy]
publication: Harvard Data Science Review, **2** (2023).
categories: [health]
url_source: 'https://hdsr.mitpress.mit.edu/pub/59k7dz80'
url_preprint: ''
journ: Harvard Data Science Review
issue: 2
page: ''
year: 2023
image: ''
pub_number: 9
---
